text:
There once was a clever old tortoise named Timmy. Timmy loved solving puzzles. One sunny day he discovered a peculiar map while sweeping his friend Olive's attic. It was marked with little symbols, most of which looked just like owls.

One particular owl looked a bit different—one had a little umbrella sticking out of its head. Thinking it might lead him somewhere fun, Timmy followed that owl all around town. It led him to the mayor's garden festival.

There were fairies holding tiny umbrellas in the air, and little critters enjoying summer umbrellas on picnic tables. Timmy admired their joy.

Just as he was about to thank his mystery owl buddy, something shiny caught his eye. Down there on a bench, a beautiful princess was tossing her hair. Her cloak fluttered behind her, and there was that umbrella – now it seemed magical!

The princess glowed softly, and she spoke. "Oh, Timmy, lost like a needle in a haystack?"

He
